info.name: Fleet API
info.description:
Complete Fleet REST API. Set `fleet_url` and `api_token` collection variables.

The Login request auto-saves the returned token. Most endpoints need `Authorization: Bearer {{api_token}}`.

item.name: Run Live Query on Host by Identifier (Sync)
Transfer Hosts by Filter to Fleet

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Firewall Enabled",
  "query": "SELECT 1 FROM alf WHERE global_state >= 1",
  "description": "",
  "resolution": "",
  "platform": "darwin",
  "critical": false
}

item.name: Run Live Query by Host Identifiers
Run Live Query by Host Names

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Running Processes",
  "query": "SELECT pid,name,path FROM processes",
  "description": "",
  "platform": "",
  "interval": 3600,
  "observer_can_run": true,
  "automations_enabled": false
}
